text: I'm screamin' f*ck n*ggas right now
You knew I was f*cked up, you knew I ain't had sh*t
I asked you multiple times to show me the way
I asked you multiple times to put me in position to get
some money. You sent me off a thousand times now it's f*ck you
You ain't give no f*ck 'bout me
You was cracking them cards and sellin' that sh*t
I was out on the block with nun' but a nick
Hunnit deep with the partnas plotting on a lick
Life on the line, taking a risk
Protecting the side, I'm bangin' the stick
You gettin' money ain't fronted me sh*t
When I asked you for it you spent that on a b*tch
I knew that you wasn't gon' ride
You say that you got me but you steady lying
If you know you got it why you couldn't provide
If you gettin' money don't leave out yo' guys
I was up on the block with a Glock in my
hands, makin' sure n*ggas made it home safe
You was up on the block with some rocks in
yo hands, I was slayin' anything came yo way
I was protection for you any day
All I ask for you is to put me in play
Mama was struggling,
daddy ain't there, you was playin' with 50k up in my face
I could've robbed you,
I could've shot you but n*gga my loyalty go a long way
You spendin' that sh*t on a b*tch and I
couldn't really trip, it's yo sh*t at the end of the day
You spendin' that sh*t on some kicks but how
can I trip, it's yo sh*t at the end of the day
But b*tch I'm yo homie so how could you
leave me, I had struggle and showing you fake, aye
I knew that you wasn't gon ride
Should've separated, should've changed my crowd
I really looked at you as one of the guys
Should've cut you off the first time that you lied
You ain't give no f*ck 'bout me
You was cracking them cards and sellin' that sh*t
